original: A low-grade transformative, Areolove will change the shape or size of the user’s areolae. Buttons with various shapes line up across the length of the medipen, featuring many ways to stylize your nipples. There’s a small disclaimer stating that this product might not work on unusual nipple types.
The medipen has a number of symbol-shaped buttons on it. You can select an option to change the appearance of your areolae.
Note that the selection will change the areolae of all your breast rows.

original: Making your selection, you inject yourself with the medipen.
You feel a brief tingling in your areolae, but nothing else happens. What a waste.
You peek down your top to get a look at the changes as they unfold.
You "+({var0}.isChestGarbed()?"strip out of your gear":"look down")+" to watch the changes as they progress.
context: <<POS:07834493>> <<VARS:var0=t>> output(" You "+(t.isChestGarbed()?"strip out of your gear":"look down")+" to watch the changes as they progress.")

original: A slight sensation of pins and needles buds in your areolae, then it rapidly builds to the point where you let out a small gasp at the intensity. As the feeling reaches its peak, each individual pinprick takes on a laser-like feeling of heat, there and gone almost too quickly to notice were it not for the staggering number of them. Your breath occasionally hitching in your throat, you watch as the transformation begins.
The sensations focus themselves around the edges of your areolae as they slowly grow. Your areolae are now larger!
The sensations focus themselves around the edges of your areolae as they slowly contract. Your areolae are now smaller!
The sensations diffuse evenly throughout your areolae, increasing the amount of tissue to reach your desired shape. Your areolae are now puffy!
The sensations diffuse evenly throughout your areolae, increasing the amount of tissue to reach your desired shape. Your areolae are no longer puffy.
The sensations focus themselves around the edges of your areolae, reshaping the outline into a much more exciting shape. Your areolae are now ".concat(b.get(e).toLowerCase(),"-shaped!")
Shivering a bit from the lingering tingling, you put your gear back on.
You need nipples to use this item.
You put the Areolove back into your inventory.
